## Checklist

### Code Quality
- [ ] TypeScript strict mode
- [ ] No `any` types used
- [ ] Proper type definitions
- [ ] No console.log or debugger left

### Styling
- [ ] Uses Tailwind CSS (no inline styles)
- [ ] Dark mode support
- [ ] Mobile responsive
- [ ] Proper color usage

### Documentation
- [ ] JSDoc comments added
- [ ] README updated (if needed)
- [ ] Guide updated (if needed)

### Build & Tests
- [ ] `pnpm build` passes
- [ ] `pnpm type-check` passes
- [ ] `pnpm lint` passes
- [ ] No new warnings

### Standards
- [ ] Follows development guidelines
- [ ] Follows architecture patterns
- [ ] Components properly organized
- [ ] Imports properly organized
